emails.subject: FW: Questions from New York Times
emails.body: FW: Questions from New York Times Jim There is another article in preparation by the NY Times. Pls. see the angle of their questions below. PHR

emails.subject: RE: Questions from New York Times
emails.body: RE: Questions from New York Times Paula, I have forwarded your message to Rex Rogers. Please work with him on the responses. Thank you. Jim

emails.subject: RE: Questions from New York Times
emails.body: Jim Mark Palmer has confirmed PR has coordinated the responses to the NY Times with Rex, although they may have been asked questions "on the fly" that did not receive direct legal input but PR used legal guidance in responding. PHR
